arts.ttl: Leeds United team news vs Norwich City as Manor Solomon injury severity revealed
arts.sum: Brenden Aaronson and Manor Solomon both start for Leeds United in tonight's clash with Norwich City despite being doubts for the match. Illan Meslier has started every Championship match this season and continues that streak tonight with Jayden Bogle, Ethan Ampadu and Joe Rodon retaining their places in defence from Sunday.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke has already said why Leeds United won’t snatch Burnley playmaker
arts.sum: Leeds United have again been linked with a surprising move to sign Burnley’s outcast winger Mike Tresor, but it’s not a deal that is likely to really entice Daniel Farke. Daniel Farke has already said why Leeds wouldn’t sign Mike Tresor

arts.ttl: MATCHDAY LIVE: Leeds United v Norwich City
arts.sum: Follow live updates and join the debate at Elland Road via our live matchday blog as Norwich City face Leeds United.

arts.ttl: How to watch Leeds United vs Norwich - TV channel, live stream and kick-off time
arts.sum: Leeds United resume their Championship campaign this evening when they host Norwich City at Elland Road. Yes, Sky Sports will be broadcasting the fixture between Leeds and Norwich in the Championship.

arts.ttl: Leeds United justified in transfer hesitation amid impressive Championship record - Isaac Johnson
arts.sum: Daniel Farke has told Leeds United supporters he will “stay awake” for opportunities in the January transfer market and some fans will no doubt be waiting up until the late hours on deadline day to see whether the club makes any last minute signings. “We have a perfect unity and this is why we are the team that has won more points, we don't want to risk that spirit in the group,” he said regarding transfer arrivals earlier this month.

arts.ttl: Confirmation seemingly emerges for Leeds United man to Norwich clash after new injury
arts.sum: Leeds United are looking likely to be without left-winger Manor Solomon for this evening’s clash against Norwich City, following a hamstring setback post-Sheffield Wednesday. However, Daniel Farke confirmed in his pre-Norwich press conference this week that he has suffered a hamstring setback that left him a 50/50 chance for this game (via LeedsLive ):

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke can't dodge contract question any longer as Leeds United dragged into transfer saga
arts.sum: Leeds United could yet be forced into a key transfer decision regarding the future of Junior Firpo before the January window closes, according to the latest Spanish reports. They cite disappointment in previous signings Ricardo Rodriguez and Romain Perraud - both of whom were recruited ahead of Firpo last summer as he had one year remaining on his current Leeds deal.

arts.ttl: Emi Buendia transfer stance confirmed after Aston Villa decision and Leeds United links
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery has admitted that Emi Buendia has the option to leave his club amid links to Leeds United in the January transfer window. With Leeds thought to be keen on a move for Buendia, the concern was that the midfielder may be blocked from leaving the club in January.

arts.ttl: Real Betis want to sign Leeds’ Junior Firpo this Jan
arts.sum: Leeds United left-back Junior Firpo is a January target for his former club Real Betis, who are eyeing a full-back that can bolster their Europa Conference League bid. It has led to a report from ABC Sevilla claiming that his former club Real Betis are eyeing a reunion this January, despite being able to agree a pre-contract signature with the 28-year-old to sign him in the summer for free.

arts.ttl: Leeds United chances tonight boosted with Norwich City having 10 ruled out
arts.sum: Leeds United are facing a seriously depleted Norwich City side this evening, as the Canaries head to Elland Road without several key players including Championship top scorer Borja Sainz. Johannes Hoff Thorup hasn’t been helped by significant injury setbacks of late, plus a lengthy suspension for his crucial goalscorer – confirming in his pre-match press conference that the same players ruled out against Sheffield United at the weekend are out tonight.
